title: Fox mage origin
description: This mod transforms players into fire-powered foxes, granting abilities like shooting fireballs, flame immunity, and enhanced agility, with unique strengths and weaknesses.
body: This mod for Minecraft lets players take on the role of a fiery fox, imbuing them with both elemental fire powers and unique traits. As a Fire Fox, players gain abilities like shooting fireballs, igniting enemies with fiery attacks, and even more! They have a natural resistance to fire and lava, making them immune to fire damage. However, they also have drawbacks, such as reduced health. This mod offers a fun, magical experience for players who enjoy playing as a fiery, agile creature with a strong connection to fire.
